reviews.review_msg: This is a difficult and demanding course, but if you put the time and effort into it, you will do well. Ghizlaine is a wonderful instructor, explains the material clearly and concisely, and is always there for extra help. I would take another class with her in a heartbeat.

Giuliano Gullotti is a very friendly and very approachable prof. Loves chatting casually with students before and after class, great guy overall. That said, FREN 302 feels much less like a class where you actually learn stuff and more like just a prolonged oral proficiency evaluation. I wouldn't recommend this class (not the prof's fault though)
